market_summary.KOSPI: Surged 4.30% to 5,638.20, rebounding strongly as Middle East tensions eased following U.S. signals.
market_summary.context: Market recovery after yesterday's 6.49% decline, with investor sentiment boosted by improved geopolitical outlook.

art_highlights.detail: Preview days begin tomorrow, March 25, with public viewing from March 27-29 at HKCEC.
Events are ramping up today, March 24, with gallery exhibitions (Zwirner, Gagosian) opening and M+ Facade commissions (Ho Tzu Nyen) now live.
